title: jasminum tortuosum
intro: Jasminum tortuosum, also known as the white jasmine or climbing jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jasminum tortuosum include reducing stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as improving cardiovascular health and digestion. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
